title: RenderingNature SMC Reversal Engine | Smart Money Concepts
author: renderingnature1
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: RenderingNature SMC Reversal Engine | Smart Money Concepts by renderingnature1.

RenderingNature SMC Reversal Engine is a Smart Money Concepts (SMC) indicator designed to help traders understand institutional market structure and identify high-probability reversal and continuation zones.
The script focuses on the structural layer of price action and highlights how liquidity, order flow, and structural shifts interact in real time.
